business.name: Old Trafford Plumbing And Heating Services
business.tagline: Reliable Plumbing And Heating You Can Trust

contact.address: 3 Brindley Rd, Old Trafford, Stretford, Manchester M16 9TR

sample_reviews.author: James R.
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from start to finish. Called them out for a boiler breakdown and they arrived within the hour. Highly recommend to anyone in the Old Trafford area.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Very professional and reasonably priced. Fixed our leaking pipe quickly with no fuss. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: David T.
sample_reviews.text: Good reliable plumbers. Had our bathroom replumbed and they did a tidy job. Communication was great throughout the whole project.

brand.usp: Based in the heart of Old Trafford, we deliver fast, reliable plumbing and heating solutions to homes and businesses across Greater Manchester. With transparent pricing and emergency cover, we're the local team you can count on.
brand.hero_headline: Your Local Manchester Plumbing And Heating Experts
brand.about_paragraph: We are Old Trafford Plumbing And Heating Services, a trusted local trade business serving Manchester and the surrounding areas. From emergency call-outs to full boiler installations, we pride ourselves on honest advice, quality workmanship, and fair pricing. Whether you need a quick repair or a complete heating system upgrade, we're here to help.
